summary: Good TypeScript and workflow structure with strong types/validation. Issues: (1) actions/checkout@v4 and setup-bun@v2 not pinned to SHA (security—best practice per requirements); (2) Duplication: JSON/Markdown report steps (lines 41-53) nearly identical, only --format flag differs—should be factored to composite action or matrix; (3) format.ts rows 8-14 have identical structure, minor duplication; (4) Critical: Workflow doesn't support test harness pattern required by task. No step captures/saves output to act-result.txt artifact. Workflow expects pre-existing secrets.json but task requires fixture-data-driven test harness that calls `act push --rm` per case and validates output. Integration missing.
